Why Us

Why should you choose Caribbean Key?

We simplify the mortgage process by comparing lenders, securing the best available rates, and guiding you through each requirement — making financing your home in Curaçao easy, transparent, and stress-free.

Benefits

//

Less Stress. More Confidence.

Get personalized mortgage support with clear guidance, transparent options, and a smooth path from consultation to approval.

Personalized Guidance

We help you choose the best mortgage option based on your goals and financial situation.

Fast Pre-Assessments

Quick but realistic evaluations so you know exactly what you can qualify for, no guesswork.

Access to Multiple Lenders

We compare rates and terms across trusted lending partners in Curaçao to find the best fit.

Clear Documentation Support

We guide you through every requirement so your application is complete, accurate, and stress-free.

Transparent Recommendations

No hidden agendas — just honest guidance designed to help you secure the right mortgage.

Smooth, End-to-End Process

From first inquiry to final approval, we handle the details so you can focus on your new home.

//

Our Process

//

How does it all work?

Our mortgage process is a simple 4 step process to make sure you get all you need, in the simplest and most stress-free way possible.

Initial Assessment & Intake

We review your income, goals, and documents to calculate a realistic mortgage estimate based on our lender requirements.

Conditional Approval & Requirements

The bank reviews your file and issues conditional approval. We guide you through fulfilling conditions such as insurance, appraisal, and proof of funds.

Application & Lender Selection

We help you choose the right lender, prepare your documents, and submit your mortgage application.

Final Approval & Closing

Once conditions are met, the bank issues final approval. The notary prepares the deed, and you complete the property transfer.

FAQs

//

Questions & answers.

There are some common misconceptions about the mortgage space in Curaçao.

What documents do I need to get started with a mortgage in Curaçao?

Most clients only need a few basics to begin: passport, proof of address, income documents, and recent bank statements. We provide a personalized checklist based on your situation — local income, foreign income, rental income, or self-employment — so you always know exactly what to prepare.

Can I qualify using foreign or mixed income?

How much can I borrow for a home in Curaçao?

How long does the mortgage approval process usually take?

Do banks in Curaçao offer different mortgage terms?

What down payment should I plan for?

Can any property be financed?

Do I need a lawyer for the property transfer?

//

Our Process

How does it all work?

Our mortgage process is a simple 4 step process to make sure you get all you need, in the simplest and most stress-free way possible.

Initial Assessment & Intake

We review your income, goals, and documents to calculate a realistic mortgage estimate based on our lender requirements.

Conditional Approval & Requirements

The bank reviews your file and issues conditional approval. We guide you through fulfilling conditions such as insurance, appraisal, and proof of funds.

Application & Lender Selection

We help you choose the right lender, prepare your documents, and submit your mortgage application.

Final Approval & Closing

Once conditions are met, the bank issues final approval. The notary prepares the deed, and you complete the property transfer.

FAQs

//

Questions & answers.

There are some common misconceptions about the mortgage space in Curaçao.

What documents do I need to get started with a mortgage in Curaçao?

Most clients only need a few basics to begin: passport, proof of address, income documents, and recent bank statements. We provide a personalized checklist based on your situation — local income, foreign income, rental income, or self-employment — so you always know exactly what to prepare.

Can I qualify using foreign or mixed income?

How much can I borrow for a home in Curaçao?

How long does the mortgage approval process usually take?

Do banks in Curaçao offer different mortgage terms?

What down payment should I plan for?

Can any property be financed?

Do I need a lawyer for the property transfer?

Questions & answers.

There are some common misconceptions about the mortgage space in Curaçao.

What documents do I need to get started with a mortgage in Curaçao?

Most clients only need a few basics to begin: passport, proof of address, income documents, and recent bank statements. We provide a personalized checklist based on your situation — local income, foreign income, rental income, or self-employment — so you always know exactly what to prepare.

Can I qualify using foreign or mixed income?

How much can I borrow for a home in Curaçao?

How long does the mortgage approval process usually take?

Do banks in Curaçao offer different mortgage terms?

What down payment should I plan for?

Can any property be financed?

Do I need a lawyer for the property transfer?
